name: Milindkumar Patel
title: .NET Developer & Data Engineer
summary: • .NET Web/Application Developer with 5+ years of strong experience in all stages of advanced Development. • Knowledgeable in the user interface, testing, and debugging processes. Bringing forth expertise in design, installation, testing and maintenance of systems. • Equipped with diverse and promising skillset. Proficient in as assortment of technologies, including AWD BPM, SSIS, ASP.NET, .NET CORE Restful API, IBM BPM, JavaScript (Angular), and Microsoft SQL Server. • Able to effectively self-manage during independent projects, as well as collaborate in the team setting. Familiarity with Agile Scrum methodology.

experience.title: Lead Developer
bullets: Worked in highly collaborative operations team to streamline the process of implementing
security confidential Azure cloud environment and introduced best practices for remediation.
Involved in setting up and configuring Microsoft Azure and AWS cloud computing platform
components.
Creating code drops/patches for deployment in pre-production and production environment
for applications within secure system.
Co-ordinate with external team members and other stake holders to understand the impact
of their changes to complete release work.
Performing code merge activities for different ASP.NET C# applications.
Helping  developers  to  resolve any  technical  issue,  troubleshooting,  project  Risk and  Issue
identification and management.
Analyze  functional requirements  and  provide  design  solution  with  latest  .NET  framework
with MS SQL database.
Tools and Tech: ASP.NET Core, ASP.NET Frameworks, C#, MS SQL Server, Azure DevOps, Angular
2+ (Angular 12), React 18, JavaScript, JSON, HTML5, CSS3, T-SQL
